programme.title: The Real Has Come! - EP 78

programme.title: Circle of Life - EP 4
programme.desc: In the polar aquarium, visitors can see many fascinating creatures from the polar regions. Yet, there’s one animal that appears only during its daily playtime - the California sea lion. Amid the joyful crowds, trainer Fu Nailu can’t help but feel a bit anxious, as the sea lion he has been training is about to give birth.

programme.title: Our National Park III - EP 2
programme.desc: This is a vibrant land at the southernmost tip of China. After the island separated from the mainland due to continental rifting, 442 species of wild animals and plants gradually evolved into species endemic to Hainan. This episode documents the story of a family of Hainan gibbons - the park’s flagship species - raising their young, and also features amphibians, reptiles, and other plant and animal species unique to Hainan.

programme.title: Hotel Del Luna - EP 12

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 609
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 103
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA GUE ANTI UTANG
programme.desc: Tommy (Hardi Fadhillah) hates his job: collecting debts for his father. His latest assignment is Bu Anisa, who hasn't paid her twenty-five million rupiah debt in five years. Tommy is ready to be firm until he meets Ratih (Naomi Zaskia), Bu Anisa's daughter. Ratih touches Tommy’s heart when she promises to pay off the debt using her meager salary as a village school teacher.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 155
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Manusia Silver Gantengnya Bikin Baper
programme.desc: Dewa (Lavicky Nicholas) moves to the big city with one goal: to get rich and marry his girlfriend back home. But his urban adventure takes a weird turn when he meets Dewi (Larasati Nugroho), a woman who makes a living through a very peculiar and unexpected profession.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 609
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 103
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: CINTA JUMBO MAS BAKSO
programme.desc: Hendra is a wealthy heir who defies his father by choosing to sell meatballs (bakso) instead of running the family empire. While preparing for a major festival, he is hit by a motorcycle carrying Ratna (Michelle Ziudith), a curvy girl with a huge appetite for meatballs. To Hendra’s fury, Ratna’s boyfriend whisks her away without apologizing. However, fate brings them together again when they cross paths at the very festival Hendra is competing in.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 155
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: How To Make King of Strawberry Sebelum Hari H
programme.desc: Refusing to marry the man her father chose, Sila (Shanice Margaretha) runs away and crosses paths with Rafan (Hardi Fadhillah). It’s love at first sight for her, but her father isn't giving up so easily. He has already prepared a scheme that is guaranteed to get under Rafan's skin and test their budding romance.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 609
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Sampahnya Dipungut Perasaanku Keangkut
programme.desc: Hana (Shanice Margaretha) works hard as a garbage collector, driving a three-wheeled motor cart every day. Her life changes when she bravely saves a young girl named Chika (Firzanah Alya) from a kidnapping attempt. Grateful for her bravery, Chika’s wealthy father, Adit (Fendy Chow), immediately hires Hana to be his daughter's full-time nanny.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 104
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SI MANIS PENJAGA HATI YANG TAK INGKAR JANJI
programme.desc: After losing her security job and having her motorcycle taken by Leo (Junior Liem), Aya (Yunita Siregar) chases him down, thinking he’s a thief. Leo is a spoiled rich man who hates being followed by guards. When his frustrated bodyguards quit, Leo's father, Mr. Herman, desperately looks for a replacement. Despite his initial doubts, Mr. Herman hires Aya after seeing her impressive pencak silat skills making her the new protector for the man she tried to punch.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 156
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mau Bikin Romantis Ternyata Bikin Nangis
programme.desc: Deva (Ika Diharjo) balances two lives: she’s a pencak silat instructor and a cleaning service worker at Rizki’s (Mahdy Reza) college. Rizki, who is nursing a broken heart after being cheated on, desperately needs a distraction. He asks Deva to pose as his new girlfriend to impress his mother, leading to a fake relationship filled with kicks and complications.

programme.title: ORDER AYAM DAPET JODOH
programme.desc: Reta (Angelica Simperler) is a beautiful but incredibly spoiled woman. After hitting Dion (Qausar Harta Yudana) with her car, she arrogantly offers him money instead of an apology. Disgusted by her behavior, Reta’s mother forces her to live and work with Dion for two months to learn humility and change her ways.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 157
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Jalan Ke Hatimu
programme.desc: Siska (Aisyah Aqilah) spends her days managing a corn plantation and selling various corn-based treats. Her peaceful life is disrupted when she nearly crashes her truck into Rangga (Junior Roberts), a handsome man who, unbeknownst to her, has been arranged to be her husband by her grandfather. Rangga’s true motive? To marry Siska only so he can sell off her beloved plantation.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 611
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 5
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Kail Pagi Makan Petang - EP 10
programme.desc: Program mengisahkan tentang teknik memancing dan ikuti pengembaran mereka untuk mengetahui ikan yang ditangkap dan masakan menarik yang akan disediakan.

programme.title: Potong - EP 12
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang pemuda Midun, yang kini menyambung legasi perkhidmatan berkhatan tradisional peninggalan arwah bapanya, seorang Tok Mudim handal di kampung.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 22
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 2
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Aku Dan Tok Wan - EP 7
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Opah Popular - EP 10
programme.desc: Badrul dan Sofia bertugas di luar negara dan menghabiskan cuti dengan balik ke kampung. Anaknya mereka dipaksa untuk tinggal bersama opah.

programme.title: Simmba
programme.desc: A corrupt police officer, works for Durva, an influential smuggler. However, his life takes an unusual turn when he decides to avenge a woman who was assaulted by Durva's brothers. Release Year: 2018 Director: Rohit Shetty Awards: 2019 Winner Bollywood BusineSS Award- Highest-GroSSing Actor- Ranveer Singh

programme.title: Coolie (1983)
programme.desc: An honest worker rises against injustice when powerful enemies exploit the poor. With courage and determination, he leads a fiery fight for dignity, justice and survival. Release Year: 1983 Director: Manmohan Desai, Prayag Raj

programme.title: A Flying Jatt
programme.desc: Aman a meek youngster who is scared of heights, discovers his superpowers when he is forced to face the evil Raka, who is sent by an industrialist to destroy humanity. Release Year: 2016 Director: Remo D'Souza Awards: 2017 Nominee Reader's Choice- Best Choreographer- Rahul ShettyPaul Cardoz

programme.title: Gadar-Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: During the partition, Tara and Sakina's joyful marriage is torn apart when her father forces her to remain in Pakistan, separating her from Tara and their family. Release Year: 2001 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Singh Saab The Great
programme.desc: Singh Saab is a responsible tax collector who believes in honesty, but Bhoodev, a conniving man, plots against him. Singh adopts a unique way to teach Bhoodev a lesson. Release Year: 2013 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Hero No. 1
programme.desc: A wealthy business heir plights his troth to household chores for the sake of love. Posing as Raju, the man of many talents, he sweeps, mops, cooks, sings, and dances his way into the hearts of his girlfriend's near and dear ones. Release Year: 1997 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Taish
programme.desc: A story of friendship and loss of innocence when two worlds clash amid a wedding when a secret exposes a betrayal, and innocent friends converge with dangerous criminals and intense violence. Release Year: 2020 Director: Bejoy Nambiar Awards: 2021 WinnerPopular Award- Most Popular Supporting ActreSS in a Digital Film- Sanjeeda Sheikh, 2021 WinnerJury Award- Best Direction in a Digital Film- Bejoy Nambiar

programme.title: Babumoshai Bandookbaaz
programme.desc: The film is a quirky ride of a reputed contract killer, Babu, and revolves around love, friendship, rivalries, and revenge. Release Year: 2017 Director: Kushan Nandy Awards: 2018 Nominee Popular Award- Best Supporting ActreSS- Divya Dutta

programme.title: Foot Fairy
programme.desc: When a serial killer with a foot fetish goes on the loose in Mumbai targetting young women, CBI officer Vivan Deshmukh is tasked with finding the murderer. Will he succeed? Release Year: 2020 Director: Kanishk Varma

programme.title: Tigers : Can A Salesman Be A Hero
programme.desc: Ayan, a pharmaceutical salesman, decides to stand against his company after discovering that their new baby formula is responsible for the death of many babies. Release Year: 2014 Director: Danis Tanovic Awards: 2014 Nominee Golden Seashell- Best Film- Danis Tanovic

programme.title: Hero No. 1
programme.desc: A wealthy business heir plights his troth to household chores for the sake of love. Posing as Raju, the man of many talents, he sweeps, mops, cooks, sings, and dances his way into the hearts of his girlfriend's near and dear ones. Release Year: 1997 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Woh Bhi Din The
programme.desc: Rahul Sinha, a famous photojournalist, returns to his alma mater as a guest speaker and takes a nostalgic trip down memory lane to relive his carefree school days and the moment he first fell in love. Release Year: 2024 Director: Sajid Ali

programme.title: Sonchiriya
programme.desc: In 1975, Indian brigands terrorize the heartlands but meet their end while being hunted down by the police. Release Year: 2019 Director: Abhishek Chaubey Awards: 2019 Winner FOI Online Award - Best Actor in a Supporting Role - Ranvir Shorey, 2019 Winner FOI Online Award - Best Make-Up and Hair Styling - Shrikant Desai, 2019 Winner Special Mention - Bhumi Pednekar - ActreSS

programme.title: Encounter Shankar
programme.desc: An encounter specialist is transferred as CI to a village which is dominated by a local goon.

programme.title: Gadar-Ek Prem Katha
programme.desc: During the partition, Tara and Sakina's joyful marriage is torn apart when her father forces her to remain in Pakistan, separating her from Tara and their family. Release Year: 2001 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.title: Tera Kya Hoga Lovely
programme.desc: A comedy of errors that traverses through the hinterlands of Haryana unfolding crazy dynamics, relationships and eccentricities that occur between family, friends, lovers, and even cops!.

programme.title: Ganapath - A Hero Is Born
programme.desc: In a dystopian future, relentless vigilante Ganapath embarks on a mission to dismantle a powerful criminal empire that rules the city in fear. Ganapath becomes a symbol of hope for the oppressed.

programme.title: Jalebi
programme.desc: A woman boards an overnight train and gets placed in a compartment with her former lover and his wife.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: Swapna, a game designer, has post-traumatic stress disorder and a chronic fear of the dark. Her life turns upside down after a serial killer enters her house and creates havoc.

programme.title: Firangi
programme.desc: In 1920 during India's freedom movement, one man firmly believes the British are not as bad as everyone believes.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: 12th Fail
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: 12th Fail
programme.desc: IPS officer Manoj Kumar Sharma embarks on a fearless journey to restart his academic pursuit, aiming to conquer the world's toughest competitive exam.

programme.title: Kuch Naa Kaho
programme.desc: A secretary's manager tells her to find a match for his nephew who does not want to get married. The nephew rejects every proposal and falls in love with the secretary instead.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Gulabo Sitabo
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: An Action Hero
programme.desc: A murder accusation turns a movie star's own life into an eccentric action thriller as he flees the country, with a vengeful politician hot on his heels.

programme.title: Ek Ladki Ko Dekha Toh Aisa Laga
programme.desc: A young woman must contend with a family that wants her to get married, a writer who is completely smitten with her, and a secret that she harbors close to her heart.

programme.title: Mumbai Saga
programme.desc: The plot of the movie is set in the era of the 80s and 90s which were marked as a transformed period of Mumbai.

programme.title: Atrangi Re
programme.desc: A Tamil boy meets a girl from Bihar, what follows is a love story for the ages. A non-linear narrative of two romances running in parallel from different timelines.

programme.title: Laapataa Ladies
programme.desc: Two newlyweds find themselves inadvertently separated from their husbands moments after their respective weddings.

programme.title: Ismart Shankar
programme.desc: Shankar, a contract killer, manages to escape after murdering a politician. Later, he helps the police find a murderer when an officer's memory is transferred to him.

programme.title: Middle Class Melodies
programme.desc: Raghava, a young man, runs an eatery in his village but wishes to open a small hotel in a nearby town. However, he faces challenges in his quest and must overcome them to succeed.

programme.title: Qaidi Band
programme.desc: Qaidi Band film revolves around seven innocent under-trials, who give a band performance in the prison to get into the good books of the authorities and secure their acquittal.

programme.title: Naseeb
programme.desc: When Pooja's father disapproves of her relation with Krishna, a humble man, he vows to become wealthy and returns to find that she is already married.

programme.title: Jaaneman
programme.desc: Suhaan, an aspiring actor, is in a fix when Piya files for divorce and forces him to pay a large amount as alimony. To avoid paying her, Suhaan uses Agastya's love for Piya and helps him woo her.

programme.title: Saajan Chale Sasural
programme.desc: A village-based singer attempts to find love and fame in the big city.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez: Kantara
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Dhokha Round D Corner
programme.desc: A criminal breaks into a married couple's home and takes the wife hostage, igniting a tense standoff that surfaces secrets and lies.

programme.title: Double Xl
programme.desc: Two plus-size women who are body-shamed, head to London to prove that dreams matter and challenge the societal norms for beauty.

programme.title: Bhaiyya Ji
programme.desc: A man stands up for his family and seeks revenge for the wrongs done towards his loved ones.

programme.title: Bell Bottom

programme.title: News

programme.title: Poongodi
programme.desc: Poongodi rises above her father's male chauvinism, intent on proving herself & pursuing a college education. Her path crosses with Saravanan, a naïve young man who blindly trusts his manipulative stepmother. Uncover the fate of the two kindred souls.

programme.title: Punitha
programme.desc: Maragatham holds her step-daughter Punitha dear, to the point of being overbearing. However, their bond turns twisted & burdened when Punitha finds her soulmate, Kabilan. Amidst family betrayals, can Punitha show her mother the true meaning of love?

programme.title: MANAMAGALE VAA
programme.desc: Narmada's mission to her ancestral village to reunite her father & his estranged family entwines with Kathir's task of finding suitable grooms for his three sisters. What unfolds when they fall in love, striving for a cause against the same enemy?

programme.title: VINODHINI
programme.desc: When her husband, a soldier, disappears in a military accident, Vinothini never loses hope, firmly believing he'll come back. Join her inspiring journey as she cares for his family & meets life's hardships as a single mother with resilience & love

programme.title: PUTHU VASANTHAM
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: LAKSHMI
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Movie-EZHUMALAI

programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. programme.title: Meurtres A Mont-De-Marsan
programme.desc: The body of a man is found submerged in a spring reputed to be miraculous. Everything suggests an esoteric ritual. programme.title: Vedi Sirippu
programme.desc: Don't miss this fun-filled talk show, along with a delightful blend of sketches, stand-up performances and humorous segments!

programme.title: Movie - Doctor
programme.desc: On the hunt for his fiancee's missing niece Chinnu, military doctor Varun stumbles upon Terry's child abduction and trafficking ring. While in a bid to save Chinnu, her family and Varun end up getting embroiled in Terry's deadly crime web.

programme.title: Movie - Captain Miller
programme.desc: A renegade Captain and his unconventional outlaws execute daring heists in the 1930s and 1940s. Miller must decide whether to continue running or confront the challenges head-on.

programme.title: Movie - Saathikku Oru Neethi
programme.desc: Saathikku Oru Neethi is a 1981 Tamil-language action drama film, directed by S. A. Chandrasekhar, starring Vijayakanth and Swapna in lead roles. Musical score by Sankar Ganesh.

programme.title: Movie - Saranam Ayyappa
programme.desc: Adaikalam, who has been imprisoned for many years, helps two other men to escape from jail. They decide to mingle with the devotees travelling to Sabarimala in order to trick the police.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Ethirum Puthirum
programme.desc: An honest district collector is accused of being linked with a terrorist organisation when he rebels against the police who have been trying to nab Arasappan, terrorist Veeraiyan's brother.

programme.title: Movie - Veerasaamy
programme.desc: Veerasamy, a lawyer and MLA, is a saviour of the oppressed and the biggest roadblock in the criminal activities of the local Health Minister and his wife who together run several illegal businesses.

programme.title: Movie - Amman Koil Kizakkale
programme.desc: Kanmani, a wealthy girl, decides to teach Chinnamani a lesson by pretending to be in love with him. Things, however, take an ugly turn when Chinnamani marries her in a fit of rage.

programme.title: Movie - Samasthanam
programme.desc: Thiru and Surya are friends whose relationship has survived many hurdles. But their bond is broken when a rift is caused due to their respective wives.

programme.title: Movie - Panakkaran
programme.desc: The illegitimate son of a rich man and a singer is raised by a poor drunkard. Before he can commit to the girl he loves, he wants to find out who his biological parents are.

programme.title: Movie - Adaikalam
programme.desc: A father has to suffer the humiliation of being away from his children and eventually being an object of their anger. But this changes once the children discover the truth about their father.

programme.title: Movie - Sivanda Kangal
programme.desc: An honest police officer bravely fights against industrialists who commit various atrocities. Even after resigning, he takes on the notorious businessman Chakravarty.

programme.title: Movie - Pudhayal
programme.desc: This film revolves around money in human relationships and the extent of its impact on the lives of protagonists Satyamurthy and Swarajyalakshmi.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Ettu Patti Rasa

programme.title: Movie - Pattalam
programme.desc: Two rival groups of adolescents from Holy Bells School engage in occasional tiffs. An unfortunate incident takes place before an athletics tournament which consequently changes their perception.

programme.title: Movie - Agni Natchathiram
programme.desc: Two stepsons of an honest noble man choose different professions. One becomes a police office and the other turns into a goon. The rest of the film revolves around how the two confront each other.

programme.title: Movie - Pangali
programme.desc: A man kills his sister and her husband for their wealth and locks up their son, Sakthivel. With the help of his father's former loyalist, Sakthivel escapes and seeks vengeance.

programme.title: Movie - Dharmapuri

programme.title: MATCH OFFICIALS MIC'D UP - TUES 14 APR
programme.desc: Join PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb and former Premier League star Michael Owen, as they use previously un-released audio from the on-field officials and VAR teams to explain refereeing decisions. This ground-breaking broadcast will feature the in-game audio of selected incidents from the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 40
programme.desc: We mark International Women's Day by celebrating the women shaping refereeing across the professional game. We explore the past, present and future of officiating, spending a day on the road with PGMO officials Natalie Aspinall, Kirsty Dowle and Emily Carney as they open up about their journeys to the top of the game.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 8
programme.desc: He's fondly remembered for grabbing the last gasp goal that won Manchester City their first Premier League title back in 2012, and with 184 goals in just 275 appearances it clear to see why Sergio Aguero has been inducted into the hall of fame. We talk to him and his former teammates to reflect on an incredible career that saw him win 5 Premier League titles, 1 F.A. Cup and 6 League Cups.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 35
programme.desc: At just 21 years old, Alejandro Garnacho has already experienced more in his young career than many others do in a lifetime. Born in the Spanish captial, Garnacho started his career in the Atletico Madrid academy. Released as a teenager, the Argentina international moved to Manchester United, where he went on to make nearly 100 senior appearances for the club over three years before joining Chelsea in the summer.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 45
programme.desc: Late last year PL Stories travelled to Dubai to spend time with Victor Moses, reflecting on a life and career shaped by resilience and determination. We delve into his difficult and deeply personal early years in Nigeria, and the tragic circumstances that led to him seeking asylum in the UK, an experience that would go on to define both his character and career.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 45
programme.desc: Late last year PL Stories travelled to Dubai to spend time with Victor Moses, reflecting on a life and career shaped by resilience and determination. We delve into his difficult and deeply personal early years in Nigeria, and the tragic circumstances that led to him seeking asylum in the UK, an experience that would go on to define both his character and career.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 35
programme.desc: At just 21 years old, Alejandro Garnacho has already experienced more in his young career than many others do in a lifetime. Born in the Spanish captial, Garnacho started his career in the Atletico Madrid academy. Released as a teenager, the Argentina international moved to Manchester United, where he went on to make nearly 100 senior appearances for the club over three years before joining Chelsea in the summer.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 32
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: MATCH OFFICIALS MIC'D UP - TUES 14 APR
programme.desc: Join PGMOL Chief Refereeing Officer Howard Webb and former Premier League star Michael Owen, as they use previously un-released audio from the on-field officials and VAR teams to explain refereeing decisions. This ground-breaking broadcast will feature the in-game audio of selected incidents from the 2025/26 season.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 8
programme.desc: Join Togo and African football icon Emmanuel Adebayor as he relives his top 10 Premier League moments. From iconic goals to unforgettable rivalries, this inspiring and entertaining show is packed with candid insights, untold stories, and the passion that defined his career.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 51
programme.desc: As the curtain comes down on Everton's time at Goodison Park, PL Stories takes a poignant look back at one of English football's most iconic grounds. For over 130 years, Goodison has been more than just a stadium; it's been a home, a fortress, and the stage for countless moments of triumph, heartbreak, and unforgettable drama.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 39
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.desc: We mark International Women's Day by celebrating the women shaping refereeing across the professional game. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 23
programme.desc: For Nico Gonzalez, arriving at Manchester City on deadline day in February 2025 was a full circle moment. The son of Francisco Gonzalez, who amassed over 500 appearances for Deportivo La Coruna and went on to be a youth coach at the Etihad from 2016 to 2019, his connection with the Blue side of Manchester was a big factor in his transfer from Porto.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 36
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 18
programme.desc: Ray Parlour spent 15 years with the Gunners, winning three Premier League titles during that time. His third was perhaps the most memorable of them all. The "Romford Pele" looks back at the 2003/04 campaign, the season of the Invincibles.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 20
programme.desc: Manchester City v QPR on the final day of the 2011/12 season will forever be remembered as the most dramatic of finales to a Premier League season. Shaun Wright-Phillips and Joleon Lescott offer the perspective from both sides, with the final day drama at the Etihad set in the context of Manchester City's Run-In and their pursuit of a first Premier League Title.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: FS MMA Michael Materla vs Kendall Grove II
programme.desc: This episode of FIGHT SPORTS MMA showcases action from KSW 78 in Szczecin, Poland, as main event fighters Michael Materla and Kendall Grove come together a decade after their first bloodbath to run it back.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Nate Campbell vs. Ali Funeka
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features lightweights Nate Campbell, aka 'The Galaxy Warrior', (32-1, 25 KOs) vs. Ali 'Rush Hour' Funeka (30-1, 25 KOs) from the BankAtlantic Center in Sunrise, Florida, USA, on February 14, 2009 in a bout viewed on television by 1.2 million.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: Featuring Men's CMX Forms and Weapons, and a World Record Break by Chip Townsend at the ISKA US Open from Disney, Orlando, Florida, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best judo of the World Team Championships from Budapest, where we will see history made as it's the first time a new mixed gender team format will be seen.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Danny Garcia vs. Erik Morales
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Danny Garcia looking to win the WBC super lightweight championship when he squares off with Erik Morales, but Garcia must battle back after suffering a nose injury early on. Also on the card, former world champions Hector Camacho and Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 featuring Daieisho, Onosho, Abi and Takayasu from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Todd Foster
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector "Macho" Camacho (47-3-0 21 KO) faces Todd Foster (33-3-0 29 KO) in a 12-round contest for the vacant IBC Welterweight Title from Atlantic City New Jersey USA.

programme.title: WCCB Uisma Lima vs. Shervantaigh Koopman
programme.desc: The IBO Super Welterweight World Championship is on the line when champion Uisma Lima of Portugal defends against undefeated Shervantaigh Koopman at the Emperors Palace in Kempton Park, South Africa. This episode features a WBC middleweight title bout between Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (45-2, 24 KOs) and Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on November 20, 2010.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Kansas City Qualifier tackle the Kansas City Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Flying Shelf Grab, Body Prop and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Alfonso Gomez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Arturo Gatti facing off with Alfonso Gomez in what would be Gatti's final boxing match. Also on the card, Andre Berto takes on veteran Carlos Quintana on his way to stardom.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Takakeisho, Tokushoryu, Kagayaki and Enho.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Heath Todd
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector "Macho" Camacho (61-3-1 29 KO) vs. Heath Todd (32-10-0 13 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from the War Memorial Auditorium in Ft. Lauderdale FL USA.

programme.desc: It's hard enough for Mojo and Bo to help Jackson get all his sheep back in their pen, but it's even harder when the hungry sheep start chewing up Preston's flower festival!

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 39

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 7
programme.desc: Roly reveals he's expecting a new baby brother or sister, and the Squirrels have questions.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 6
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins. Over a few weeks, Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her and Mum offers some good advice.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.desc: When the saddleback clownfish leave the safety of their carpet anemone home back at Safari World, Andy travels to the Great Barrier Reef in Australia to find out why.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.desc: Barbalala receives a package and discovers little pink animals inside, which she calls the SQUEAKIES. // Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 101
programme.desc: It's the Barbababies's birthday. They all want to do something different with Barbapapa!

programme.desc: Darington can't wait to ride the Great Rocketship Ride, the tallest, fastest carnival ride in all of Axle City! But when Darington's tickets blow away, he and Blaze must go on an epic adventure to retrieve them!

programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger challenges the Adventure Bay team to a soccer match, and Ryder and the Paw Patrol are called in to play. // The Paw Patrol must work as a team to overcome some dirty tricks by Mayor Humdinger and pull out a victory!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S4 - EP 408
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger steals Adventure Bay's Ferris Wheel.

programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 111
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build Builder Cove's first ever Fire Station, complete with an inspection from Paw Patrol's Marshall! But when Speed Meister's sneaky sabotage traps Marshall's Fire Truck, the pups work together to put out a fire construction-style.

programme.title: DORA S4 - EP 409
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become mermaids and help Marisol the Mermaid save her home, Sirena Sea! // Dora and Boots go across the sea to help their dolphin friend find the best gift ever, a magic jewel!

programme.title: DORA S4 - EP 410
programme.desc: Dora stops a frantic octopus Swiper and saves the Pearl Day Party! // Dora meets Raquel the Rock Lobster and helps her get the missing instruments back in time to play at the big music show!

programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 114
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 115
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 116
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 117
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 112
programme.desc: The pups are starstruck when their favorite TV renovation star, Hank Hammer, comes to see them at work. // Cap'n Turbot is bringing Mayor Greatway a big surprise. But when a thick fog rolls in, the pups have to build a lighthouse fast!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S1 - EP 113
programme.desc: After uncovering dinosaur bones, the pups decide to build a dinosaur museum! // When Omar the Mail Carrier breaks his foot, it's up to the pups to make sure he can still deliver the mail by building ramps all over town.

programme.title: Paw Patrol S12 - EP 1210
programme.desc: Farmer Al and Yumi are expecting a baby when Al thinks his beloved goat Garby is running away. // Farmer Yumi dreams about what her new baby will be like when she's bigger.

programme.title: Paw Patrol S12 - EP 1211
programme.desc: Uncle Otis accidentally slips and tosses Julia and Julius's new goldfish, Marigold, into the river. // When Ms. Marjorie and Mr. Park don wingsuits to see a rare flower, a flying squirrel sends them off course!

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 204
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.desc: Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket.

programme.desc: When a windy day derails construction on an ice cream shop, Rubble, Mix, Wheeler, and Charger are on the chase. // There's a mysterious squeak in City Hall. Mayor Greatway asks Rubble and Charger to find and fix the squeak before her big speech!

programme.desc: Dora travels across the rainforest, creating a song for her dad so they can celebrate Papi-Dora day!/Dora is ready for the Churro Fiesta when the Pirate Piggies eat all the churros. Dora tracks down a treasure chest of golden churros to save the day!

programme.desc: What's that smell? A strange odor is chasing the jungle animals away from their homes. // Olivia the Ostrich has fallen in to the canyon! The pups need to work together to lift her to safety, while keeping her soon-to-hatch eggs warm.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S6 - EP 607
programme.desc: Gustavo Goodway's guitar is missing. The pups need to find it before tonight's campfire concert! // Farmer Yumi's new Yoga Goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing! It's up to the Paw Patrol to find the goats and return them to Yumi's farm.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 207
programme.desc: Barbapapa finds refuge in the house that Francois' parents built for him. // The house of Barbapapa is far too small now that Barbamama and the Barbabebe have arrived in his life.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 208
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life! / Barbabright and Barbabeau have designed a huge wooden toy powered by an engine using bio oil.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S1 - EP 106
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S1 - EP 107
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure. // It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town. // Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: DORA S1 - EP 105
programme.desc: Boots and Dora journey to Banana Hill to bring Isa a Friendiversary gift - a flowerpot that Boots painted himself! // Dora and friends throw Swiper a surprise birthday party. On the way to the party, Swiper attempts to swipe his own surprise present.

programme.title: DORA S1 - EP 106
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find an adorable baby axolotl. They have to bring him home, but he keeps wandering off. // The Big Red Chicken gets stuck in a giant floating bubble and is heading straight for a volcano! Dora has to do a mid-air rescue to save him.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S7 - EP 729
programme.desc: It is Molly Mole's first day at school and she quickly makes best friends with Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S7 - EP 730
programme.desc: It's Richard Rabbit's birthday party and George is invited, and that can only mean one thing; Soft Play!

programme.title: Peppa Pig S7 - EP 731
programme.desc: Peppa and family find some great things to buy from the market and even get a special gift from Mr. Fox's stall.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S7 - EP 732
programme.desc: Peppa and family go on an exciting trip to Paris to see the sights and meet Delphine Donkey and her family.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S7 - EP 733
programme.desc: George, Peppa and Mummy Pig head off to Miss Rabbit's clothes shop to get George some brand new clothes.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S7 - EP 734
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy and Daddy Pig have gone to visit Madame Gazelle and her wonky house!

programme.title: Peppa Pig S7 - EP 735
programme.desc: Peppa, George are helping Grandpa pig to dig a brand new pond for his garden!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S4 - EP 405
programme.desc: At the Axle City Fair, Blaze and AJ realize they don't have enough coins to use the new Supersize Prize Machine. So to earn money, Blaze gets three different jobs, transforming into super-cool vehicles to take care of business.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S2 - EP 211
programme.desc: With the other pups at parachute training, Marshall must get a group of loose kittens back all by himself. But he has the help of the other pups' packs! // Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a family of deer stuck on slippery ice!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S6 - EP 613
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger creates robotic Pants to cheat at the Most Amazing Athlete Contest. They go haywire so Pups have to save runaway Mayor.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 216
programme.desc: Rubble & the pups find Grandpa Gravel's lucky bowling ball. Too bad Builder Cove doesn't have a bowling alley... until now! // When a sudden superbloom traps Motor, Lily, and Park Ranger Rose, the pups need a flower-friendly construction solution.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 222
programme.desc: After a hiking trail mix-up confuses everyone going to Mr. Ducky-Doo's birthday party, the pups help them get back on track.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile S1 - EP 113
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile S1 - EP 112
programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for "later".

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 114
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Stuart’s larger-than-life ex-girlfriend surprises him with a visit, Aja, Steve, Vex, and Nana join them on a triple date- where issues from each of their relationships come to a head. Meanwhile, Krel, Toby, and Eli discover a new passion: Sci-Fi filmmaking.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 21
programme.desc: Krel finally gets the wormhole generator working, only for Luug to eat it! The Royals race to catch their teleporting pup before their secret alien identities are uncovered. But the chase for Luug uncovers something far worse… Morando is on Earth.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Shashi finally reveals his master plan.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: The kids battle Shashi in Las Vegas as Shashi tries to take down evil billionaire Cleve and use Skeleton Key to create a new world order. Frostee has a plan to get Skeleton Key offline, but it only gives Tony ten seconds to take Shashi out and save the world.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Tony and his crew have been working as spy racers in LA for a while now and are itching to go international. Whey they discover a mysterious man with a strange tattoo of a formula in a smuggling ring bust, Ms. Nowhere finally agrees to let them go to Rio to investigate the tattoo and the whereabouts of one of her agents who has gone dark - Layla Gray.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 35
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hummingbird didn't hum. She was called Songbird and Songbird thought she could sing like a Bird… but sadly that was not the case. All the animals tried to help Songbird improve her singing but nothing worked. What could they do?! Then Tortoise has an idea, maybe Songbird can sing without opening her beak!! Songbird agrees and hums the most beautiful hum Tinga Tinga has ever heard. From that day on Songbird was called Hummingbird. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 36
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Baboon didn't have a bare bottom and he was very naughty. Baboon loved to play tricks. He played tricks on Elephant. He played tricks on Ostrich. He even dared to play tricks on Lion, the King of Tinga Tinga! And then all the animals decided it was time for the tricks to stop and Baboon to get a dose of his own medicine. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 17
programme.desc: Pat must deliver an old bath tub to Pencaster Lighthouse. But when he goes to collect it from Thompson Ground, the bath ends up rolling away into Greendale with Jess inside! When Pat catches up with the bath he finds PC Selby about to impound it for being an un-road-worthy vehicle. Pat explains it's a Special Delivery and at last gets on his way.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 18
programme.desc: Mrs Goggins is on holiday, so Sarah Gilbertson is looking after her dog Bonnie. She calls in on Pat and proves she has zero control over the dog. But there is only time for Jess to roll his eyes before Pat is called out on a special delivery - it's urgent! He has to deliver the RADARSCOPE (designed by Ted) to Mrs Goggins, who is up in Scotland! Pat has no idea what a radarscope is and neither does Ben. But they know what urgent means, so they spring into action and load it into Pat's jet plane.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 17
programme.desc: Molecom is very grateful to Plugger for rescuing him after yet another of Flash's pranks. But Plugger is soon frustrated by Molecom's attempts to help… Meanwhile, Roary is trying hard to beat his best lap time.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 18
programme.desc: Cici is fed up with never winning and decides not to take part in the race that day. Can Roary persuade her to change her mind?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 19
programme.desc: Roary takes Loada on a jaunt to the beach… only to discover that sand and lorries don't mix too well!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 20
programme.desc: PC Pete and Nick are up at Silver hatch giving the cars their road tests. Is Maxi really going to be as good as he says he is or will he be unpleasantly surprised?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 37
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is in charge of the Swapsy Game. Everyone puts a toy into the Swapsy Wagon and takes a toy out! It's brilliant fun - until the fairies yo yo. disappears from the wagon altogether. Cloppycorn's very upset. No one will trust him to pull the wagon again! Noddy tells him not to worry. He's going to investigate and help Cloppycorn find the missing toys.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 38
programme.desc: Cloppycorn is very upset unhappy because his special felt ball, Snuggleball, is missing. Noddy needs to investigate quickly! He follows the clues around Fable Forest and discovers that PatPat broke snuggleball by mistake when she rode over it with her scooter. Noddy asks PatPat to make a new snuggleball but Cloppycorn doesn't like it. It doesn't feel cuddly like his special toy. Clever Noddy asks everyone in Toyland to give the new snuggleball a big hug.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 39
programme.desc: New stickers, with a picture of a mysterious bandit, have appeared in Toyland. Clockwork Mouse begs Noddy to investigate. He finds himself going head to head with jealous Hoof who wants to prove that Noddy isn't the only investigator in Toyland. Hoof thinks he's solved the case in no time, but Noddy's attention to detail makes him realise the bandit isn't quite what he seems.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S1 - EP 40
programme.desc: The pirates are having a spring clean of their galleon, much to the annoyance of Pirate Stripes who wants to go on a treasure hunt. Later that day, the pirate treasure disappears! Oh no! Noddy needs to investigate at once. A strange new galleon appears on the horizon. Could it be Tina the Terrible? Has she stolen the treasure? Using all his detecting skills Noddy follows the clues to the DareDale Caves where he realises that the ship on the horizon isn't Tina the Terrible's galleon at all.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: It's Purrsday, the happiest cat day of the year, and all the Gabby Cats have a special purrsday surprise. Gabby and Pandy make peekaboo kitty paper chains with Baby Box, decorate a Purrsday cake with Cakey, Gabby gets a special kitty makeover with Mercat, and everyone sings a Purrsday song with DJ Catnip. For the COTD, DJ Catnip shows us how to make a DJ Catnip purr-stick!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a cup of crayons and a coloring book with the same doodle on every page. When she takes it into The dollhouse each of the Gabby Cats sees something different in the doodle and turns it into a uniquely magical drawing. But when CatRat gets stuck inside the book, Gabby and Pandy must go on a doodle rescue mission to save him.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: The Riders find a Puffertail and train her to join the family. She struggles to learn but soon finds herself with a chance to make a big rescue.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Donna plans a garden party for Rona, but the only problem is that her garden is overgrown and neglected. The team try to transform this jungle into a backyard just in time for the party. / Lula finds an angry goose on the loose, and Team Zenko need to get it out of the park before soccer camp starts.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When "something" starts snatching things and causing havoc in Marcus' house, Phoebe and the Dew Drops investigate only to find that it's a stray kitten that they need to catch and find a home for before Marcus returns home. But in the end, Marcus decides to take the kitty in, as his own. / Lola isn't very good at "Hide & Seek" so the Dew Drops help her improve her game. But she becomes so good that no one can find her! And now she’s going to be late to her own surprise tea party!

Using all his detecting skills Noddy follows the clues to the DareDale Caves where he realises that the ship on the horizon isn't Tina the Terrible's galleon at all.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 26
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes-why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: When shark and pilot fish are separated it’s up to Kelp, Scallop, Cruz, and Waverly to help them find each other again. / Scallop’s friend Theo finally comes clean on why he’s always rushing off.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Tag wants to bring her new neighbor, Scooch, to the Party in the Tree. But a series of traffic jams make Tag impatient, and she keeps trying to find different ways to get to the party. Thanks to Tag’s handiness - and one of Lady Lydia’s hats - they make it to the party just in time. \ Pawston’s new canine mail carrier keeps getting chased by dogs, so Tag and Scooch have to help him deliver the mail.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch team up to get all of Scooch's chores done in time for the Barkapellas Bark In the Park In the Dark concert. \ Tag is so excited to join the Sam Whippet’s Race Cadets. But when Tag and Scooch show up at the racetrack, there’s lots of competition. And to complete the first challenge - a pedal car race - they’re going to have to work together.

programme.title: Dinotrux S1 - EP 23
programme.desc: When Skrap-It gets struck by lightning, he's suddenly smart and comes up with a plan for D-Structs to remove the Dinotrux from the crater for good.on truck! Full-on fun! Watch giant Ty Rux, his little buddy Revvit and the crew come face-to-face with evil D-Structs.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: When the PALs and Snips get caught in a sandstorm, the girls must keep Snips calm and safe

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 41
programme.desc: Eep cheats her way into being considered an adult; Grug learns he's no longer the strongest caveman and turns to a radical method for building brawn

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 42
programme.desc: When Sandy can't join animal wrestling she poses as "Mandy Monkhuahua"; In order to help Munk, Grug sticks super worms up his nose that make him smarter

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 15
